headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +16.4)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 98% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Fears dominate despite a negative score, with 51 quotes including 23 at strong intensity - people are expressing deep concerns even if overall activity is below average.

• Fears dropped significantly from yesterday (-4.1 to -12.4) and sit near the bottom of their 55-day range, suggesting unusually quiet fear-related discussions.

• Frustrations plummeted dramatically from yesterday's high (33.8 to -4.4) while optimism recovered from its low point (-20.4 to -0.4).
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
